items.prompt: A file whose name starts with . is usually…
choices: Hidden from plain ls (shown with ls -a)
items.explain: Dot-prefixed names are hidden unless you list with -a / -la.

items.prompt: Which command reveals .bashrc in a directory listing?
It is safer to inspect shell config with cat or less before editing it.
items.explain: Read first; a bad edit can break new interactive shells.

choices: A project dotfile telling Git what to ignore
items.explain: .gitignore is a hidden project file used by Git.
